characters.name: Alan Deaton
characters.description: Dr. Alan DeatonDescriptionTeen Wolf DruidFirst AppearancePack MentalityLast AppearancePressure Test Dr. Alan Deatonis a recurring character inTeen Wolfand is playedSeth Gilliam. He is a veterinarian atBeacon Hills Animal Clinicwhere he isScott McCall's boss and becomes a mentor to Scott and his friends on all things supernatural.

characters.name: Alec
characters.description: AlecActorBenjamin WadsworthStatusSeason 6 Minor Character Alecis a young werewolf appearing in the final episode of theTeen Wolfin Season 6.  While Alec only appears in the single episode, creator Jeff Davis says the character represents the future ofScott McCall's Packand is symbolic of the group's efforts to save supernaturals from theHunters. Alec is played by Benjamin Wadsworth.

characters.name: The Argent Family
characters.description: The Argent Familyis a family of characters featured inMTV's Teen Wolf. While they were introduced on the show as a group of Werewolf Hunters inSeason 1, most members have since died or given up hunting. Kate Argent says, before meetingScott McCall, the family had been active for more than 400 years and says they were "a powerful, wealthy, aristocratic family ofwerewolf hunters."

characters.name: Allison Argent
characters.description: Allison ArgentAllison Argent in Beacon Hills 2026RelativesChris Argent (father)Victoria Argent (mother, deceased)Gerard Argent (grandfather, presumed dead)Kate Argent (aunt, status unknown)AffiliationScott McCall PackOccupationHunter, archer, fighterBiographical informationDate of deathNovember 2011Place of deathOak Creek Military facilityPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byCrystal ReedAppears inTeen Wolf Seasons 1-3, Teen Wolf: The MovieDebutWolf MoonJune 2011 Allison Argentwas the daughter ofhuntersChris ArgentandVictoria Argentand a main character on MTV’sTeen Wolffrom the beginning of the series until her death in November 2011 (IU). She is brought back to life during the events ofTeen Wolf: The Moviein 2026 (IU).

characters.name: Araya Calavera
characters.description: Araya CalaveraActorIvonne CollStatusWerewolf HunterFirst AppearanceMore Bad Than GoodLast AppearanceSmoke & Mirrors Araya Calaverais the leader of a family ofHuntersin Mexico. Her last name translates as "Skull" and is the word used for the skulls made of candy or clay used in Mexican "Day of the Dead" celebrations. Her family's bullets bare the skull symbol. Despite her cold, ruthless personality, her shows a much stronger adherence to the Hunters' Code. Examples of this are where she tortures werewolves but does not kill them without cause, and they lockKate Argentin a room with a straight razor to force her to kill herself as part of the Hunter's "code of honor."

characters.name: Bobby Finstock
characters.description: Bobby FinstockActorOrny AdamsStatusLacrosse Coach/Economics TeacherFirst AppearanceWolf MoonLast AppearanceThe Wolves of War Coach Bobby Finstockis a the coach ofBeacon Hills High School's lacrosse and cross country teams, The Cyclones, onMTV’s Teen Wolf. He is played byOrny Adams. Finstock is also a teacher of Economics and Physical Education. Often used for comic relief, Coach Bobby is eccentric in behavior and appearance. His hair is usually unkempt and his office, glimpsed inThe Tell, seems much disorganized. He seems to care more about the success of students on the field than in the classroom offering good grades for his players in exchange for various tasks. Finstock is a recovering alcoholic with 15 years sobriety.

characters.name: Braeden
characters.description: BraedenActorMeagan TandyStatusMercenaryFirst AppearanceTattooLast AppearanceApotheosis Braedenis amercenaryor "gun for hire" on MTV'sTeen Wolf. This means she will fight for someone in exchange for money. Braeden makes a living by taking dangerous jobs. She is unconcerned with the moral questions of the job, meaning she will work for those considered "evil" as well as the good guys.

characters.description: L. BrunskiActorAaron HendryStatusHead Orderly (Deceased)First AppearanceEcho HouseLast AppearancePerishable L. Brunskiwas the Head Orderly at theEichen Housemental health facility. A cruel man, He terrorizes and unnecessarily drugs patients, seeming to enjoy their pain.

characters.name: Chimera
characters.description: Teen Wolf ChimeraDescriptionManufactured CreaturesFirst AppearanceCreatures of the NightLast AppearanceThe Wolves of War Teen Wolf Chimeraare manufactured supernatural creatures introduced inSeason 5. The term describes experiments created by theDread Doctorsas part of their plan to reviveLa Bête du Gévaudan. Only four chimera experiments -Hayden Romero,Theo Raeken,Corey Bryant, andMason Hewitt- survived the events of Season 5.

characters.name: Corey
characters.description: CoreyActorMichael JohnstonStatusChimeraFirst AppearanceCondition TerminalLast AppearanceThe Wolves of War Corey Bryantis a student atBeacon Hills High Schooland a chimera who has the ability to become invisible like a chameleon. He apparently comes from a neglectful home because has told Mason that his parents hardly notice and didn't even know he was dead.

characters.name: Corinne
characters.description: Desert WolfActorMarisol NicholsStatusProfessional Assassin/Malia's MotherFirst AppearanceOuroborosLast AppearanceApotheosis Corinneis a werecoyote andMalia Tate's birth mother onTeen Wolf.She is also a trained assassin and a hired killer codenamed Desert Wolf. She was apparently sexually involved withPeter Haleat some point in the mid 1990's and their union resulted in pregnancy. Malia was quickly adopted by the Tate Family.

characters.name: Corporal Rhys
characters.description: Corporal RhysActorSkyler MaxonStatusDeceased soldierFirst AppearanceEcho House(Skeleton)Last AppearanceThe Fox and the Wolf Corporal Rhyswas an officer at Oak Creek Internment Camp whereNoshiko Yukimurawas held at in 1943. His body was used by aNogitsunewho caused destruction in its path. Even after the fox spirit is exorcised, it uses his corpse as a presence whenStiles Stilinskiand his friends confront the spirit.

The Darach pretended to be Jennifer Blake, an English teacher atBeacon Hills High School.
